name: Elemental Novice
short_description: Embark on a thrilling journey in a world of elemental magic. Play as a young wizard mastering the elements to survive against dark forces. Explore haunting landscapes, hone your spells, and unravel mysteries while battling supernatural foes in this captivating adventure
detailed_description:
Embark on a journey of elemental magic discovery. Defeat waves of enemies and upgrade your kit to bring devastation to your foes.

Currently the game features just a taste of things to come, with a playable survival level and a whole kit of spells to play with, with a lot of other things in the works.

This is a passion project with a lot of regular updates in mind that will bring even more value to the whole package!

supported_languages:
English*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
